display.purpose: Page-level heroes only. Rare — one per screen at most.

body.purpose: All reading content. 65–75ch max line length.

label.purpose: Navigation, buttons, section dividers, badge text. Always uppercase.

mono.purpose: VA file numbers, certificate IDs, structured form values.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Full-screen modals, crisis interrupt overlay, PIIWarningModal. Physical separation from page.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus ring on all interactive elements. Old Glory Red, 3px, no blur.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Standard easing for all state transitions.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover state color shifts (nav items, buttons, inputs). Collapses to 0ms under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: duration-normal
motion.purpose: Component expand/collapse (AIDisclosureBanner). Collapses to 0ms under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: ScoreRing fill animation only. Collapses to 0ms under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: crisis-pulse
motion.purpose: CrisisLineBanner slow pulse. Runs only under prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Below: bottom tab bar nav, single-column layout, hide drop zone.

breakpoints.name: desktop
breakpoints.purpose: Above: sidebar + two-panel layout for Chat and Document Review.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The sole high-emphasis action. One per screen section. Old Glory Red background, uppercase Oswald label.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #B22234; color: #F5F5F5; font-family: 'Oswald', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.61rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0 24px; height: 48px; min-width: 48px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #7A1A1A; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #B22234; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary / dismiss actions. Transparent, Text Secondary color. Same dimensions as primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #8A96AA; font-family: 'Oswald', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.61rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0 24px; height: 48px; min-width: 48px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #EDF0F4; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #B22234; }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar nav item. Default and active states. Old Glory Red left border marks active page.
components.html: ChatDocuments
components.css: .ds-nav-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'Oswald', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8A96AA; text-decoration: none; border-left: 3px solid transparent; min-height: 48px; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #EDF0F4; background: #222640; } .ds-nav-item--active { color: #EDF0F4; background: #1C2033; border-left-color: #B22234; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #B22234; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Benefit / story category filter. Pill shape, Aged Canvas default, Old Glory Red when active.
components.css: .ds-chip-group { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-chip { background: #1C2033; color: #8A96AA; font-family: 'Oswald', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.61rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 6px 14px; border: none; border-radius: 100px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-chip:hover { background: #222640; color: #EDF0F4; } .ds-chip--active { background: #B22234; color: #F5F5F5; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #B22234; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content container. Aged Canvas surface, 4px radius, no shadow at rest.
components.html:
Benefit Title

Plain-English eligibility summary for this benefit. Written for a veteran who has never navigated VA paperwork.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #1C2033; border-radius: 4px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Oswald', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.33rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #EDF0F4; margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.6; color: #8A96AA; margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field. Field Black background, Border stroke, red focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: 'Oswald', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.61rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8A96AA; } .ds-input { background: #0D0F14; color: #EDF0F4; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid #2A3149; border-radius: 4px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #4A5060; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #B22234; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #B22234; }

components.name: Score Ring
components.description: Precision instrument gauge for document quality. 24 tick marks, score-tiered arc color, 800ms fill animation.

components.name: Crisis Line Banner
components.description: Non-dismissable safety banner. Sticky top, z-index 1000, Crisis Crimson background. Never hidden.
components.html: ★VETERANS CRISIS LINE: CALL 988 PRESS 1  |  TEXT 838255  |  CHAT VeteransCrisisLine.net★
components.css: .ds-crisis-banner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; height: 48px; background: #8B0000; text-decoration: none; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-crisis-text { font-family: 'Oswald', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.61rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-crisis-banner:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #F5F5F5; outline-offset: -3px; }

components.name: AI Disclosure Banner
components.description: Required on every AI-powered screen. Field Blue background, Military Olive left border. Collapsible per session.
components.html:
⚙

VetAssist uses AI to provide educational information. This is not legal or medical advice. For claim-specific help, contact a VA-accredited VSO.
components.css: .ds-ai-disclosure { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 18px; background: #1A2744; border-left: 3px solid #4A5240; } .ds-ai-icon { color: #8A96AA; font-size: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; padding-top: 2px; } .ds-ai-text { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-style: italic; color: #8A96AA; line-height: 1.5; flex: 1; margin: 0; } .ds-ai-dismiss { font-family: 'Oswald', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.67rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8A96AA; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; padding: 0; min-height: 48px; min-width: 48px; } .ds-ai-dismiss:hover { color: #EDF0F4; } .ds-ai-dismiss:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #B22234; }

components.name: Document Drop Zone
components.description: Drag-and-drop upload area. Dashed border default, Old Glory Red border on drag-active.
components.html:
📋

Drop Your Documents Here

PDF, JPG, PNG, HEIC, TIFF, DOCX, TXT — Max 25 MB per file
components.css: .ds-drop-zone { border: 2px dashed #2A3149; border-radius: 4px; background: #0D0F14; padding: 40px 32px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); outline: none; } .ds-drop-zone:hover, .ds-drop-zone:focus-visible { border-color: #B22234; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #B22234; } .ds-drop-icon { font-size: 40px; } .ds-drop-heading { font-family: 'Oswald', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #EDF0F4; margin: 12px 0 4px; } .ds-drop-sub { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #8A96AA; text-align: center; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
This system is built around a single physical object: a flag that has been carried, folded, and unfolded many times. Not the recruiting poster flag — the field flag. Its colors are deep and muted, its fabric has weight, its stars are earned. That object is the emotional register for every design decision: authority without aggression, dignity without bureaucracy, service without performance.

The palette is called Stars & Field. Field Black covers 60% of every surface — a near-black with enough blue cast to read as intentional, not default. Aged Canvas raises cards and panels off the base at 30%. Old Glory Red appears on no more than 10% of any screen — CTAs, active navigation states, the crisis banner. Its rarity is structural. Typography pairs Oswald (a compressed, military-stencil condensed sans) with Source Serif 4 (a reading-optimized serif with warmth) — command voice and human voice in balance.

This system explicitly rejects: VA.gov's institutional blue; clinical white-and-teal health portal aesthetics; BetterHelp's performative corporate warmth; generic dark-mode SaaS (Inter, purple-to-blue gradients, identical card grids); and military recruiting aesthetics.
keyCharacteristics: Dark mode primary, always — low-stimulation by design, not by trend
Compressed condensed type (Oswald) for structural chrome; warm serif (Source Serif 4) for all reading content
Sharp corners throughout (4px radius) — precision over softness
Single accent color (Old Glory Red) used with discipline — maximum 10% surface coverage
Flag watermark at 3% opacity in sidebar — felt, not seen
Every interactive element meets 48px touch target minimum

rules.name: The Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Old Glory Red appears on ≤10% of any screen. Its rarity makes it visible. If a screen has more than one red element competing for attention, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The Crisis Isolation Rule
rules.body: Crisis Crimson (#8B0000) belongs to the crisis banner and nothing else. No other component, state, or decoration may use it.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Oswald owns all structural chrome: navigation, buttons, labels, section headers, the logo. Source Serif 4 owns all reading content. Never swap them.

rules.name: The Never-Inter Rule
rules.body: Inter, Roboto, and Arial are prohibited on all surfaces. They carry no character and signal generic SaaS.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards, panels, inputs, and navigation are flat at rest. Shadows are reserved for elements that physically interrupt page flow (modals, overlays).

rules.name: The Focus Ring Rule
rules.body: Every interactive element shows a 3px Old Glory Red focus ring on keyboard focus. Never hidden, never styled to match the surface.

rules.name: The One Red Button Rule
rules.body: Each distinct action area has at most one Primary button. If two actions compete, one is demoted to Ghost. Never two red buttons side by side.

rules.name: The No-Nesting Rule
rules.body: Cards never contain cards. Use a background tint or a horizontal rule to create sub-grouping within a card.

dos: Do keep Old Glory Red to ≤10% surface coverage on any screen.
Do use Oswald for structural chrome and Source Serif 4 for reading content — the two-voice split is non-negotiable.
Do set all touch targets to a minimum of 48×48px.
Do gate every animation behind prefers-reduced-motion: reduce.
Do use 4px radius on all interactive components.
Do write error messages as: [What happened] + [What to do next].
Do use JetBrains Mono for structured data: VA file numbers, certificate IDs, claim reference numbers.
donts: Don't use Inter, Roboto, or Arial anywhere.
Don't use VA.gov blue (#003E73 or similar) on any surface.
Don't replicate Healthcare.gov or clinical health portal aesthetics.
Don't replicate BetterHelp or mental health SaaS aesthetics.
Don't use purple-to-blue gradients, glassmorphism, hero metrics, or identical card grids.
Don't use military recruiting aesthetics: eagles, camouflage, aggressive red-white-blue maximalism.
Don't use border-left greater than 3px as a decorative stripe on cards or list items.
Don't use Crisis Crimson (#8B0000) for anything except the CrisisLineBanner.
Don't make any animation faster than 100ms.
Don't dismiss or hide the CrisisLineBanner under any condition.
